_comment: Phase 4 tag migration map (GHL cleanup plan 2026-07-12). Source of truth for flat->canonical backfill. RULES: (1) backfill is ADDITIVE — add canonical, never remove flat until consumers re-keyed + 2-week soak; (2) all IDs in wiki/outputs/2026-07-12-ghl-live-snapshot/tags.json; (3) new tags MUST be namespaced (comms:/place:/role:/project:/source:/interest:/engagement:). Per RC2 (contained-adelaide-2026.json) campaign-stage:* and engagement:* namespaces are KEPT as the lifecycle layer — no migration.

canonical_duplicates_to_resolve._comment: Two canonical tags for the same concept — pick one, migrate the other.
canonical_duplicates_to_resolve.tier: active / tier: aware / tier: engag: the spaced variants look accidental — fold into goods-tier-* or tier:*

decide_before_migrating._comment: No obvious canonical home, or judgment call needed. Do NOT migrate in the bulk pass.
decide_before_migrating.newsletter-stream:*: Phase B plan says fold into comms:* — confirm mapping per stream (funder-brief, media-pack, youth-justice-brief, etc.)
decide_before_migrating.goods-role-store: no role:store canonical — create role:store or map to role:supplier?
decide_before_migrating.contained / contained-hot-lead / contain: map into project:contained + engagement:*/role:* combos per RC5/RC6
decide_before_migrating.goods-hot / goods-warm / goods-cold / go: Goods-scoped engagement temperature — fold into engagement:* or keep Goods-scoped?
decide_before_migrating.goods-tier-aware / goods-tier-engaged /: Goods segment tiers — keep as-is or namespace goods:tier:*?
decide_before_migrating.cultural:sacred-knowledge: OCAP boundary — ADR required before ANY action (wiki/decisions/). Do not touch in bulk migration.
decide_before_migrating.audience-brand / audience-funder / audie: audience-* vs role:* overlap — likely fold into role:*
decide_before_migrating.24-carrot-gardens / act-inquiry / act-re: project tags without a certain project:* home (act-cg has no project:act-cg canonical — confirm intended code) — extend project-codes or retire

keep_as_is.goods-src-* / goods-grant-* / goods-repo: Goods operational tags — working set, revisit post-QBE
keep_as_is.auto-created-from-xero / grantscope-sour: system markers (rt-webhook-proof-x + goods-src-sweep-test are test tags — retire candidates once verified unused)
